title: Presence Protocol — Error Envelope (Mechanism A)
description: Typed-error envelope embedded in successful tool responses to survive MCP runtime normalization. When this object is the (top-level or structured-content) payload, the SDK MUST raise a typed exception keyed on `code`.

code.description: Stable error code from the registry in presence-protocol.md §6.1.

data.description: Implementation-specific context object. Shape varies by code; consult the spec.
